_observed: POSITIVE FIXTURE — a real ENGLISH Neo Genesis Typhlosion that the resolver SHOULD accept (identity passes). Captured live via the build-step-0 probe (deleted after). Language=English (passes the hard gate); Set='Neo Genesis' (matches the SDK setName for this card); Card Number='18/111' (numerator 18 — note eBay/listings number Neo Genesis Typhlosion as 18/111, which the catalog slug neo1-17 may disagree with — flagged in the probe findings as a catalog-number reconciliation item, NOT a resolver bug); Finish='Holo'. This particular listing is a graded PSA 6 (Graded=Yes), so it doubles as a GRADED-path positive. NOTE graded detection nuance: this one DOES carry Graded=Yes, but the probe found other graded slabs (BGS/PSA) where Graded was blank and only 'Grading Company'/'Grade' were present — goal #1's graded gate must check all three + the top-level condition='Graded'. See docs/probe-findings-listing-aspects-2026-06-06.md.
title: Pokemon Typhlosion Neo Genesis Unlimited Holo #18 PSA 6
